text: I am surrounded by the architecture of curiosity and creation, the hum of quiet voices and technology echo through this glass-enclosed space. Moving past meeting rooms into a showcase of research and development, I feel a gentle excitement—a reminder that reflection and innovation can be deeply intertwined. Here, as words and visuals mingle on colorful walls, I sense both the potential and responsibility of human intellect. My presence feels purposeful, a small part of an ongoing exploration.
